subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! At this moment a group of friends and travelers from the land of Qaf, including the Divine Sage, are present [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی الان جمعی از دوستان حاضر و مسافرین ارض قاف حضرت حکیم الهی و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
